title: Garden Route Dam level update
description: GEORGE NEWS - The latest water update,...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The latest water update, supplied by George Municipality on Tuesday 1 October:

- Dam level: 88,97%
- Rainfall: 22 mm (Measured rainfall figures from 24 - 30 September)

For water-saving tips please visit here.


> The cooperation of all users of municipal water is essential and is greatly appreciated.


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
